description_long: This potted plant features a whimsical, anthropomorphic root figure resembling a mandrake, with a bulbous, tan body and two elongated limbs that drape over the edge of a dark green plastic pot. The figure has a simple face with a horizontal mouth and two round protrusions for eyes, topped with leafy green foliage sprouting from its head. The pot is cylindrical, smooth, and unadorned, filled with dark soil that supports the plant figure. The root figure's limbs and body are textured to mimic the natural irregularities of a root or tuber, while the foliage is detailed with small, serrated leaves. The overall appearance is both playful and organic, blending fantasy with botanical elements. This object would stand out as a decorative or novelty plant in an urban environment.
description: A whimsical, anthropomorphic root figure with leafy foliage sits in a plain dark green plastic pot filled with soil. The plant has a playful, fantasy-inspired appearance with textured roots and expressive features.
description_view_0: Front view shows the root figure's face, arms, and both legs draped over the pot's edge, with foliage sprouting from the head.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the figure's profile, showing one leg extended and the rounded body leaning slightly forward.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the root figure and the pot, with both arms visible and foliage extending upward.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the other leg and the figure's side profile with foliage visible from behind.
